steps.title: Spot the defining clue
steps.content: The phrase leaves his signature is the key. The noun "signature" — something created and marked — tells us that leaves must mean to write or create something visible.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Define: leaves here means to mark or put down something visible. Substitute each choice: A) Writes his signature — Gogol writes his name in brush strokes, which fits exactly. B) Switches his signature — switches means to change or swap, not to place a mark; eliminated. C) Allows his signature — allows means to permit, which makes no sense with a physical mark; eliminated. D) Promotes his signature — promotes means to advance or advertise, not to place a mark; eliminated. Verdict: A is correct.
